data.name: Settings.General.Language.Help
data.value: Switch the UI language. Selecting a value reloads the page.

data.name: Settings.General.DefaultFolder.Help
data.value: Sets the default path for new sessions. When empty, the user home folder is used.

data.name: Settings.General.FavoriteFolders.Help
data.value: Shown as suggestions when creating a new session.

data.name: Settings.General.Version.PreviewHint
data.value: Local pre-release build. Includes changes up to the PR number / commit shown. Click to open the commit on GitHub.

data.name: Settings.General.Community.Help
data.value: Bug reports, feature requests, and questions are welcome there.

data.name: Settings.Display.TerminalLinkCopyMode.Label
data.value: Copy terminal URLs and paths on tap (don't open)

data.name: Settings.Display.TerminalLinkCopyMode.Help
data.value: For fullscreen mobile shortcuts where you can't navigate back. File/folder paths are copied too. Saved per device (browser).

data.name: Settings.Display.SidebarWidth.Help
data.value: Width of the session list (15%–70%). You can also drag the border.

data.name: Settings.Display.TerminalHeightRatio.Help
data.value: Height split between terminal and input panel (50:50–90:10). Drag the border to adjust.

data.name: Settings.Notifications.Browser.RevokeHelp
data.value: You can revoke the notification permission from your browser's settings.

data.name: Settings.Notifications.Browser.RequestHelp
data.value: To receive desktop notifications when processing completes, allow browser notifications.

data.name: Settings.Notifications.Threshold.Help
data.value: Set to 0 to notify on every completion.

data.name: Settings.Sessions.SortOrder.ByLastAccessedSub
data.value: Most recently used sessions appear at the top

data.name: Settings.Sessions.SortOrder.Help
data.value: In "By last used" order, usage of child (worktree) sessions is reflected in the parent's position.

data.name: Settings.Sessions.Display.GitChangesOnBadgeClick
data.value: Show Git changes on badge click

data.name: Settings.Sessions.Display.GitChangesOnBadgeClickSub
data.value: Shows changed files; toast when clean

data.name: Settings.Sessions.Display.Help
data.value: Choose which additional info to display in the session list.

data.name: Settings.Sessions.InputPanel.HideHelp
data.value: Hide the bottom input panel to use more space for the terminal.

data.name: Settings.Export.Export.Help
data.value: Downloads session data as a JSON file.

data.name: Settings.Export.Import.Help
data.value: Select a JSON file to import session data. Existing sessions are kept and the imported data is added.

data.name: Settings.Commands.Help
data.value: Register commands shown in the button bar for each terminal type.

data.name: Settings.Commands.GroupNamePlaceholder
data.value: Leave empty to keep as standalone button

data.name: Settings.Commands.CommandBodyPlaceholder
data.value: Multi-line OK. With Insert mode, this gets put into the textarea.

data.name: Settings.CliOptions.Help
data.value: Register frequently used command-line options per CLI. Toggle them on or off via checkboxes when creating a new session. Options with the switch turned on are pre-checked by default. Wrap values containing spaces in double quotes (e.g. --add-dir "C:\path with space").

data.name: Settings.RemoteLaunch.Help
data.value: Start Claude Code sessions from your phone when you're away from your PC. Use the URL below on your mobile device.

data.name: Settings.RemoteLaunch.UrlWarning
data.value: Keep this URL private. Anyone with this URL can launch sessions on your machine.

data.name: Settings.RemoteLaunch.PasswordPlaceholder
data.value: When set, a password will be required at access time

data.name: Settings.RemoteLaunch.PasswordHelp
data.value: If empty, the URL alone grants access.

data.name: Settings.RemoteLaunch.RegenerateGuidTitle
data.value: Regenerate GUID (existing access URL will be invalidated)

data.name: Settings.RemoteLaunch.RegenerateGuidHelp
data.value: Regenerating invalidates the existing access URL.

data.name: Settings.Special.ClaudeModeKey.Help
data.value: Select the keyboard shortcut used for mode switching in Claude Code.

data.name: Settings.Special.ClaudeModeKey.ConflictNote
data.value: Alt+M can conflict with other functions in some environments. If that happens, try Shift+Tab instead.

data.name: Settings.Special.VoiceInput.Help
data.value: When enabled, a microphone button appears in the text input panel. Speech recognition only runs while the button is held down (Chrome recommended).

data.name: Settings.Special.DevTools.Help
data.value: When enabled, the Diagnostics, Buffer, and Notification Test tabs appear in the input panel.

data.name: Settings.Special.CaptureRawStream.Help
data.value: Records raw terminal output to %LOCALAPPDATA%\TerminalHub\captures\ (for VT emulator verification). Turn it back off after reproducing.

data.name: Settings.Special.Logs.Help
data.value: Opens the folder where application log files are stored.

data.name: Settings.DevDiagnose.ScrollInfo.Initial
data.value: Scroll position info will appear here

data.name: Settings.DevBuffer.Help
data.value: Downloads the session's output buffer (up to 2MB) as a file.

data.name: Settings.Message.ThresholdNegative
data.value: Notification threshold must be 0 or greater

data.name: Settings.Message.PathNotExists
data.value: The specified path does not exist

data.name: Settings.Message.FolderNotExists
data.value: The specified folder does not exist.

data.name: Settings.Message.FolderDuplicate
data.value: This folder has already been added

data.name: Settings.Message.ImportResultFormat
data.value: Import complete ({0} added, {1} skipped as duplicates). Please reload the page.

data.name: SessionCreate.FolderPlaceholder
data.value: Enter or select a folder path

data.name: SessionOptions.Claude.PermissionMode.AutoTitle
data.value: Auto-approves low-risk operations and prompts only for high-risk ones

data.name: SessionOptions.Claude.PermissionMode.DefaultTitle
data.value: Prompts for confirmation on every operation

data.name: SessionOptions.Claude.PermissionMode.HelpAuto
data.value: Auto-approves low-risk operations and prompts only for high-risk ones (--permission-mode auto).

data.name: SessionOptions.Claude.PermissionMode.HelpDefault
data.value: Prompts for confirmation on every operation.

data.name: SessionOptions.Gemini.ApprovalMode.DefaultTitle
data.value: Prompts for confirmation on every tool use (default)

data.name: SessionOptions.Gemini.ApprovalMode.AutoEditTitle
data.value: Auto-approves safe operations like file edits

data.name: SessionOptions.Gemini.ApprovalMode.HelpDefault
data.value: Prompts for confirmation on every tool use (default).

data.name: SessionOptions.Gemini.ApprovalMode.HelpAutoEdit
data.value: Auto-approves safe operations like file edits.

data.name: SessionOptions.Gemini.SandboxHelp
data.value: Docker Desktop must be installed to use this feature.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.Preset.Default.Help
data.value: Allow development and network access, and ask you to approve potentially unsafe actions.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.Preset.Recommended.Help
data.value: Automate routine work while AI reviews actions that may be unsafe on your behalf.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.Preset.Custom.Help
data.value: Choose sandbox, approval, and network behavior individually.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.WindowsSandbox.Help
data.value: Elevated enforces boundaries through a dedicated low-privilege user.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.NetworkAccess.Help
data.value: Controls network use by git, gh, package managers, and other commands.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.WebSearch.Help
data.value: Codex web search is independent from network access for commands.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.Yolo.Help
data.value: Adding this launch argument allows Codex to operate across the entire computer. While enabled, all permission presets and detailed settings above are ignored.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.YoloWarning.Message
data.value: Only use this argument in an isolated environment (WSL/Docker/VM/CI).

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.YoloConfirm.Title
data.value: This disables the sandbox and approvals

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.NoAltScreen.Help
data.value: Avoids the alternate screen and keeps Codex output in the terminal scrollback (--no-alt-screen).

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.Sandbox.DefaultTitle
data.value: Do not add --sandbox; use the Codex CLI default.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.Sandbox.Help
data.value: Limits external communication and file access.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.ApprovalPolicy.Help
data.value: When Codex should ask for approval (--ask-for-approval)

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.ApprovalPolicy.HelpUntrusted
data.value: Treat as untrusted. Prompts for every operation.

data.name: SessionOptions.Codex.AutoReviewApprovals.Help
data.value: A reviewer agent evaluates actions that require approval. This uses additional model calls, and actions are not run when review fails.

data.name: SessionOptions.Antigravity.Help
data.value: Type any extra args you need into the field below.

data.name: SessionOptions.Grok.Help
data.value: Auth is left to the GROK_CODE_XAI_API_KEY env var or first-run browser OAuth.

data.name: SessionOptions.Grok.AlwaysApproveHelp
data.value: Skip interactive approval prompts (intended for CI; use with care).

data.name: SessionSettings.DisplayName.Help
data.value: If blank, the folder name will be used

data.name: SessionSettings.Commands.Help
data.value: These commands appear in the quick-send bar for this session only (after the global commands).

data.name: SessionSettings.Commands.SaveHint
data.value: Additions, edits, and deletions are saved immediately.

data.name: SessionSettings.RestartFailed
data.value: Settings were saved, but session restart failed.

data.name: SubSession.GitRequired.CreateWorktree
data.value: A Git repository is required to create a worktree.

data.name: SubSession.GitRequired.ExistingWorktree
data.value: A Git repository is required to add an existing worktree.

data.name: SubSession.Detached.Help
data.value: Create only the worktree folder without a branch. After creation, you can switch to any branch inside the folder using git switch.

data.name: SubSession.FolderSuffix.Help
data.value: Leave empty for auto-naming. When set, the worktree folder will be named {parent}-{suffix}.

data.name: SubSession.FolderSuffix.Invalid
data.value: Contains invalid characters (< > : " / \ | ? * not allowed; cannot start with "." "-" or end with ".")

data.name: SubSession.SessionName.Help
data.value: Leave empty to auto-generate a name.

data.name: SubSession.SessionName.Placeholder
data.value: Auto-named from the folder if left empty

data.name: SubSession.NewBranch.Help
data.value: A new worktree will be created for this branch

data.name: SubSession.NewBranch.Invalid
data.value: Not a valid Git branch name (space ~ ^ : ? * [ \ and ".." are not allowed; cannot start with "." "-" or end with "." "/"; reserved names like HEAD are not allowed)

data.name: SubSession.BranchExistingWorktree.Title
data.value: A worktree already exists for this branch

data.name: SubSession.BranchExistingWorktree.Help
data.value: Please use the "Existing worktree" tab to add it

data.name: SubSession.SamePath.InfoFormat
data.value: Opens in the same folder as parent session "{0}"

data.name: SubSession.NewFolder.Help
data.value: The folder will be created automatically if it doesn't exist

data.name: SubSession.NewFolder.InfoFormat
data.value: Starts a session in the new folder "{0}"

data.name: SubSession.ErrorFormat
data.value: An error occurred during the operation: {0}

data.name: SessionList.EmptyHint
data.value: Use the button above to create a session

data.name: SessionList.Badge.Select
data.value: Waiting for selection (please answer the question)

data.name: CommitInfo.NoFilesMerge
data.value: File list is not shown for merge commits

data.name: Root.NoSessionSelected
data.value: Select a session from the left sidebar

data.name: Root.Placeholder.ClaudeCode
data.value: Type a message for Claude Code...

data.name: Root.Placeholder.GeminiCLI
data.value: Type a message for Gemini CLI...

data.name: Root.Placeholder.CodexCLI
data.value: Type a message for Codex CLI...

data.name: Root.Toast.PrNotOnGitHubFormat
data.value: Not a GitHub repository, cannot open: {0}

data.name: Root.Toast.SelectSessionFirst
data.value: Please select this session first, then recreate the terminal
